positive: A whimsical and stylish symmetrical mandala design featuring constellations, celestial bodies, and stylized mythical creatures like glowing phoenixes and celestial wolves. The composition should be a highly intricate, centralized circular emblem suitable for a wearable print. Use a color palette of deep indigo, iridescent silver, cosmic violet, and neon teal, achieving a strong, bioluminescent contrast against a dark background. The linework must be crisp, clean, and highly detailed, resembling engraved metallic etching mixed with glowing neon paint. Include elements of crescent moons, nebula swirls, and geometric celestial mapping. Flat vector aesthetic mixed with luminous paint effects. Full body, perfectly centered, highly detailed, elegant.
negative: blur, artifact, text, watermark, dirty, messy, low detail, low contrast, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, grainy, noise, poorly drawn, signature, graffiti, realistic photography
